results.rendered_html: brahma—vaivarta or brahma—vaivar˚taka, n. ‘metamorphoses of Brahmā’ (who is identified with Kṛṣṇa), N. of a Purāṇa (one of the most modern of the 18, containing prayers and invocations addressed to Kṛṣṇa with narratives about his loves for the Gopīs and Rādhā &c.),  VP. ;  Pañcar.  ( IW. 514  &c.)
